case_title: PATRICK JOSEPH GAVIN VS. LEONARDO MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER (EMPLOYER) FILED BY APPELLANT GAVIN, PATRICK JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUAL DBA GAVIN CONSTRUCTION AS TO RESPONDENT MARTINEZ,  LEONARDO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2015 9:50 AM
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR STAY OF COURTS DECISION AND JUDGMENT DATED MAY 4, 2015, MEMO OF PS AND AS IN SUPPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 57278321) FILED BY OTHER STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
DECLARATION OF M. COLLEEN RYAN IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APP FOR STAY OF COURTS DECISION AND JUDGMENT, MEMO OF PS AND AS IN SUPPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 57278321) FILED BY OTHER STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $5,675.75 RE 33111 FOR TRANSACTION W0814C15D014 (OTHER TRUST DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO PATRICK JOSEPH GAVIN, DOC #1906782739, WARRANT #38203800, DATED MAY-19-2015

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-24-2015 IN 502, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR COURT ORDER TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND ORDER FROM MAY 4 2015 - MOTION BY MARTINEZ SET ASIDE JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT GAVIN ON APPEAL OF LABOR COMMISSIONER IS DENIED. COURT'S REVERSAL OF LABOR COMMISSIONER'S JUDGMENT REMAINS. MARTINEZ TO TAKE NOTHING FROM GAVIN. COURT SETS ASIDE JUDGMENT FOR COSTS FOR MR. GAVIN IN THE AMOUNT $1,125.75. NEITHER PARTY RECOVERS FROM THE OTHER PARTY. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK KEVIN LEE, CSR NOT ON THE RECORD, D505
ORDER GRANTING IN PART AND DENYING IN PART LABOR COMMISSIONER'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND ORDER FROM MAY 4, 2015
DEPOSIT OF UNDERTAKING DEPOSITED BY APPELLANT GAVIN, PATRICK JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUAL DBA GAVIN CONSTRUCTION
DECISION ON APPEAL FROM ORDER OF LABOR COMMISISON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT GAVIN, PATRICK JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUAL DBA GAVIN CONSTRUCTION RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MARTINEZ,  LEONARDO $1,125.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,125.75, THE COURT AWARDS COSTS TO PLAINTIFF/APPELLANT, PATRICK GAVIN IN THE AMOUNT OF $450.00, PLUS THE FILING FEES, PLUS THE FEES FOR THE UNDERTAKING, IN THE AMOUNT OF $675.75 FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $1125.75. THE COURT ORDERS THE ENTIRE AMOUNT $5675.75 (DEPOSIT OF UNDERTAKING ON DEC.15, 2014) BE RETURNED IMMEDIATELY TO MR. PATRICK GAVIN. SEE SCANNED DOC.

ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR STAY OF COURT'S DECISION AND JUDGMENT DATED MAY 4, 2015

TRIAL CONCLUDED. IN 1/2 HOUR. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II
